title: Need a meaningful way to display "Rating" results from forms
excerpt: Please add a widget that will display rating results in a meaningful way. Currently it takes General Castor to convert ratings into a score/number in order to display results on a widget.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add a widget that will display rating results in a meaningful way. Currently it takes General Castor to convert ratings into a score/number in order to display results on a widget.
